platformDescription: 海外互动直播平台（占位，不稳定）

playback.reason: 部分直播流需要授权播放 token，未登录或受风控时会被 403 拒绝

changelog: Parse HLS master playlist to provide individual quality/resolution options instead of only Auto
Add official Kick icon asset set and package assets in plugin zip
Improve playback handling: detect invalid playback auth token and provide clearer error
Add signed playback URL retry path and cookie-auth hint for access-controlled streams
